since_last: 75% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.30%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.78% · BTC +0.34% · Gold +1.35% · Nasdaq100 +1.40%. 75% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.30%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.30%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.70%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.70%, AMD +7.64%, ANET +7.49%, VRT +7.10%, INOD +6.29%. Laggards: AVAV -5.24%, SPCX -2.99%, UPST -2.88%, DDOG -2.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.99% at $157.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
